World Health Organization. (2023, March 15). Global health report 2023. https://www.who.int/health-topics/global-health

OpenAI. (2024). GPT-4 technical report. https://openai.com/research/gpt-4

European Commission. (2022, September). Digital education action plan 2021-2027. https://education.ec.europa.eu/

Centers for Disease Control and Prevention. (2023, January). CDC guidelines for AI in healthcare. https://www.cdc.gov/

National Institutes of Health. (2024). NIH data management and sharing policy. https://www.nih.gov/data-management
